phrases.pronunciation: Ana uhibbuka katheeran (to male) / Ana uhibbuki katheeran (to female)
phrases.context: Used to express deep affection towards someone.
A compliment used to describe someone's appearance.
A poetic way to express devotion and deep emotional connection.

phrases.pronunciation: Aftaqiduka katheeran (to male) / Aftaqiduki katheeran (to female)
phrases.context: Said when you are not with someone you care about and feel their absence.
Expresses a belief in the lasting nature of a romantic relationship.
